creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
We had a report on IRC as well.  In their case, base was 14.0 and upgraded to 14.1, yet they get:

# readelf -n /lib/libcxxrt.so.1
[...] ABI tag: 1400097
# readelf -n /lib/libc++.so.1
[...] ABI tag: 1401000

Which would seem to indicate that it's running a 14.0 libcxxrt.so.1 still and the upgrade to 14.1 apparently didn't update libcxxrt.so.1 for some reason.
